## Scope

Describe the exact problem and the implementation boundary.

## Product impact

Explain installation, runtime, compatibility, security, benchmark or maintenance effects.

## Version lock

- [ ] All active package and product identities remain `0.0.1`.
- [ ] The release channel remains `pre-release`.

## Validation

- [ ] Python tests
- [ ] TypeScript `npm ci`, type-check and tests
- [ ] Installer tests
- [ ] Repository hygiene check
- [ ] `MANIFEST.sha256` refreshed and verified
- [ ] No credentials or private payloads added

## Claim boundary

- [ ] No internal fixture is presented as external superiority, adoption, live certification, SWE-bench, OOLONG or production maturity evidence.
